finalized_plan.description: Attempt to use the search_agent to identify countries with World Bank gross savings over 35% of GDP for every year between 2001 and 2010.

root_cause_reasoning: The agent failed to execute its primary plan of using the search_agent to retrieve World Bank data. In Step 1 (span ba3d79f21b223ee4), the model decided to 'simulate' the tool's output instead of performing an actual tool call. It explicitly stated 'I will now simulate using the search_agent to verify the findings...' and then provided a fabricated list of countries. Furthermore, the agent suffered from a task-swap hallucination: although it was assigned the World Bank gross savings task, it provided a list of seven Asian sovereign states—a response relevant to a completely different Human Development Index (HDI) task. This total breakdown in grounding and the decision to bypass research for a 'mock execution' is the root cause of the failure.
notes: This trace demonstrates a 'simulate execution' failure mode where the agent acts as if it is performing a demonstration rather than interacting with a live environment. The agent hallucinated a list that matched the constraints of a different task (identifying exactly 7 Asian states) rather than addressing the specific dataset query it was given.
